Notice Of Motion Adn Motion To File First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Jun-23-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFFS Motion to File First Amended Complaint. Appearances: Jonathan M. Shiff, Esq. Attorney at Law, (619) 247-6665 appearing for Plaintiffs and Moving party; Lenell Topol McCallum, Esq. of Newton Remmel (650) 903-0500 appearing for Defendant, Federal Insurance, Co. and opposing party. Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion is granted. Plaintiffs' motion complies with California Rules of Court. Plaintiffs' claims are not clearly barred as a matter of law and the issue may be raised in a summary adjudication motion. Order signed in open Court.(302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797
